title: Register beskid_nexus submodule for compiler knowledge graph

source.subject: Add beskid_nexus submodule for compiler knowledge graph

body:
Adds `beskid_nexus` to `.gitmodules` and `manifests/default.xml` with README cross-links so the knowledge graph service is a first-class superrepo checkout target.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`72698c7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/72698c7)
- **Subject:** Add beskid_nexus submodule for compiler knowledge graph
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `nexus`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-nexus-operational`

## What shipped

Adds `beskid_nexus` to `.gitmodules` and `manifests/default.xml` with README cross-links so the knowledge graph service is a first-class superrepo checkout target.
